data.title: Discover Health Adds Two Board-Certified Pediatricians to Expand Access for San Francisco Families
data.description: Two new doctors, Dr. Nicole Glynn and Dr. Sophia Hurd, have joined Discover Health's concierge pediatric program in San Francisco. This addition aims to enhance access to care and build stronger relationships with families in the area. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026.

data.title: Neuspera Medical Announces 12-Month Pivotal Trial Results for the Company's Integrated Sacral Neuromodulation System for Urinary Urge Incontinence
data.description: New data suggests that 94% of participants in the test phase experienced significant relief from symptoms without any serious adverse events related to the device. The study indicates that 30 minutes of daily iSNM therapy could effectively alleviate symptoms of UUI. Neuspera® Medical, Inc., based in San Jose, California, released these findings on March 5, 2026, highlighting the potential benefits of their innovative treatment method.

data.title: ResilExec Coaching Expands Its Executive Development Model Under the Leadership of Brian Baldari
data.description: A new approach to developing executive preparedness and impactful leadership is being introduced by ResilExec Coaching in Brick, New Jersey. Founded by Brian Baldari, the company aims to provide a Strategic Framework for Professional Certainty, Structural Wellness, and Sustainable Executive Influence. This initiative, launched on March 5, 2026, highlights the importance of developing key skills for executives to thrive in their roles and have a lasting influence.

data.title: Reko Reports Results for Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026
data.description: In Windsor, Ontario, Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) released its second quarter results for the period ending January 31, 2026. The highlights of the quarter show a decrease in sales by $0.6 million or 5.8% compared to the previous year. The quarterly net income saw an improvement of $64 to $377, a 20.4% increase from the prior year. Earnings per share for the quarter were $0.07, up from $0.05 per share a year ago. During the six months leading to January 31, 2026, the company allocated capital which included a $2.7 million mortgage repayment and $2.2 million in other investments.

data.title: Memelinked Social Media powered by cryptocurrency launching July 2026
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in North Salt Lake, Utah, a new social media platform called MemeLinked was launched by Pablo Cro under PABLO CRO LLC. Unlike other platforms, MemeLinked is designed as a mobile-first, meme-focused social media experience catering to creators, communities, and cryptocurrency enthusiasts. The project aims to provide a unique space for users to engage with memes and crypto in one platform.

data.title: Nodal Exchange Achieves Trading Records in Natural Gas and Environmental Markets in February
data.description: In February, Nodal Exchange experienced record-breaking trading activity in both the natural gas and environmental markets, surpassing previous benchmarks. This notable achievement highlights the growing significance of the exchange, with substantial numbers of transactions being executed within these sectors.

data.title: Supercharging Edge AI: Apacer Launches Industrial Grade Storage for Raspberry Pi Platforms
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Apacer Technology Inc. introduced its newest storage products intended for use with Raspberry Pi systems. These offerings, including industrial microSD cards, PCIe SSDs, and the cutting-edge PT25R-Pi model, are all in alignment with Raspberry Pi platforms. Apacer Technology Inc., listed on the TWSE as 8271, showcased its latest lineup to cater to the growing demand for storage solutions compatible with Raspberry Pi.

data.title: The Marena Group Announces Planned Leadership Succession and Appointment of New CEO
data.description: In Lawrenceville, Georgia, on March 5, 2026, The Marena Group, a prominent worldwide supplier of medical-grade compression apparel, revealed the selection of Adam Epstein as the new Chief Executive Officer. Mr. Epstein takes over from Dale Clendon, who is stepping down following this announcement.

data.title: Consumers Energy Foundation to Award $50,000 for Three Small Towns in Put Your Town on the Map Competition
data.description: The Consumers Energy Foundation announced the launch of the annual Put Your Town on the Map pitch competition in Jackson, Michigan, on March 5, 2026. The competition aims to address the distinct challenges that local communities encounter and is offering $50,000 in grant funding to support innovative projects. Entrants are encouraged to participate and showcase their ideas for the chance to receive financial assistance for their initiatives.

data.title: From Seoul to Sephora: Dr. Groot Introduces K-Beauty Haircare's Next Chapter
data.description: A prominent Korean haircare brand is set to debut at Sephora, revolutionizing hair care with a focus on scalp health. Dr. Groot, ranked as the top Korean brand for hair thickening, is renowned for its evidence-based products and contemporary emphasis on scalp care. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026, underscoring the brand's commitment to innovative hair solutions.

data.title: Why Does Chronic Back Pain Make Everyday Sounds Feel Harsher? Brain Imaging Study Points to a Treatable Cause
data.description: A recent study conducted at CU Anschutz has discovered a connection between sound sensitivity in individuals with chronic back pain and distinct alterations in the brain. The research indicates that those experiencing chronic back pain tend to process normal sounds with more intensity compared to those without pain. This finding suggests a potential neurological explanation for the heightened sensitivity to sound in this group. However, the study also revealed that sound sensitivity in chronic back pain patients can be alleviated through therapy. This sheds light on the possibility of improving the quality of life for individuals with chronic back pain by addressing this specific aspect. The study, which was carried out in Aurora, Colorado, underscores the importance of acknowledging and managing sensory symptoms in chronic pain conditions.
